query:
SELECT slotType, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(AVG(monthlyCostExGst),2) as avg_cost, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN linkedServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND linkedServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_service,
       costSource
FROM retail_bundle_cost_inputs 
GROUP BY slotType, costSource
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:

       SUM(CASE WHEN linkedServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND linkedServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_service,
       costSource
FROM retail_bundle_cost_inputs 
GROUP BY slotType, costSource
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
